# Graphics mode

**Data field**

A 16-bit integer that specifies the transfer mode.

## Overview

The transfer mode specifies which Boolean operation QuickDraw performs when drawing or transferring an image from one location to another. See [doc://com.apple.qtff/documentation/QuickTime-File-Format/Graphics_modes] for a list of graphics modes supported by QuickTime.

## Data fields

- **Size**: A 32-bit integer that specifies the number of bytes in this video media information header atom.
- **Type**: A 32-bit integer that identifies the atom type.
- **Version**: A 1-byte specification of the version of this video media information header atom.
- **Flags**: A 3-byte space for video media information flags.
- **Opcolor**: Three 16-bit values that specify the red, green, and blue colors for the transfer mode operation indicated in the graphics mode field.
